channel.title: Convert urls in WordPress content
channel.description: When a user adds an internal link to content in a post, this link will be relative to the WordPress installation, not the Frontity installation. Is it possible to rewrite urls in the post content, so they will direct to the correct location in the Frontity installation instead of the WordPress installation?

item.title: Convert urls in WordPress content
item.dc:creator: dominique
item.description:
I’ve found an already opened FD about this: Make the backend URL a global setting

Read full topic

item.title: Convert urls in WordPress content
item.dc:creator: dominique
item.description:
When a user adds an internal link to content in a post, this link will be relative to the WordPress installation, not the Frontity installation. Is it possible to rewrite urls in the post content, so they will direct to the correct location in the Frontity installation instead of the WordPress installation?

Read full topic
